classification: GATE R1 TCP-PROXY PRECONDITION PASS WITH LIMITATION

identityBinding.method: Exact environment name plus unique service name, service-specific connect label, and prior sanitized topology mapping

limitations: The dashboard screenshots do not display service IDs; exact ID binding relies on the unique service names in the selected environment and the prior sanitized topology artifact.
The mobile dashboard shows an empty Public access configuration state rather than a literal numeric zero.
The proof establishes configured-proxy absence at capture time, not immutable future absence or every possible external reachability mechanism.
This observation must be repeated immediately before the first Gate R1 mutation because networking configuration can change after capture.
No successful fixed-projector query is claimed.

independentReview.basis: Exact environment name, unique offline Redis/Postgres and validator topology, service-specific connect labels, and Public Networking pages with no generated domain, port, endpoint, or configured-proxy row.
